name: Group Layout with Label
summary: Group element that wraps controls in a labeled section (like a VerticalLayout with a heading)
whenToUse: Visually grouping related fields under a section heading
When you want a bordered/labeled container without full page separation
notes: A Group is like a VerticalLayout but with a visible label/heading
The `label` property sets the section heading text
Groups render with visual separation (border/card) depending on the renderer
Use Groups within pages/categories to sub-divide long sections
